items.title: Presentation: Beyond Coding: How Senior ICs Grow Influence and Drive Impact
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Beyond Coding: How Senior ICs Grow Influence and Drive Impact. Netflix’s Kasia Trapszo discusses the transition from writing code to scaling organizations.

items.title: GitHub Expands Secret Scanning with General Availability of MCP Server Integration
items.summaryShort: GitHub Expands Secret Scanning with General Availability of MCP Server Integration. GitHub has announced the general availability of secret scanning support through its MCP Server, extending automated credential detection and remediation ca

items.title: AdonisJS v7 Ships End-to-End Type Safety, Reworked Starter Kits and Zero-Config OpenTelemetry
items.summaryShort: AdonisJS v7 Ships End-to-End Type Safety, Reworked Starter Kits and Zero-Config OpenTelemetry. AdonisJS version 7 introduces end-to-end type safety and reworked starter kits, alongside improved documentation.

items.title: Article: Time-Series Storage: Design Choices That Shape Cost and Performance
items.summaryShort: Article: Time-Series Storage: Design Choices That Shape Cost and Performance. Every time-series database makes a set of storage design decisions: how to lay out rows, when to compress, what to partition on.

items.title: Copy Fail and Dirty Frag: Linux Page-Cache Exploits Target Every Major Distribution
items.summaryShort: Copy Fail and Dirty Frag: Linux Page-Cache Exploits Target Every Major Distribution. Two recent Linux kernel vulnerabilities have been disclosed: Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) on April 29, 2026, and Dirty Frag (CVE-2026-43284 and CVE-2026-4350

items.title: Instructure strikes deal with hackers who breached it twice
items.summaryShort: Instructure strikes deal with hackers who breached it twice. The maker of the Canvas school software said it "reached an agreement" with the hackers, but provided no guarantees that the hackers would not release the data or keep their word.

items.title: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
items.summaryShort: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool. A new startup called Dessn has raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.

items.title: TikTok now wants to be the place you book the trip you just saw on TikTok
